title: Regular Expression Full Match
hints: Consider using dynamic programming or recursion with memoization to handle the overlapping subproblems created by the star operator.
Define a state dp[i][j] representing whether s[i:] matches p[j:]. Focus on how to transition when p[j] is not a star versus when it is.
When p[j] is a star, you can either skip the pattern element entirely (match zero) or consume a character from s if it matches the preceding element.
